description: You are preparing a Tor Browser profile for use in a severely bandwidth-constrained environment (e.g., via a throttled satellite connection or heavily censored Tor bridge). Configure Tor Browser for maximum bandwidth conservation by setting the following preferences: 'permissions.default.image' to 2, 'browser.display.use_document_fonts' to 0, and 'media.autoplay.default' to 5. Verify the configuration by navigating to https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page and save a screenshot of the resulting page to /home/ga/Documents/low_bandwidth_test.png.
